title: xDeck Package Manifest
description: Manifest contract for tenants/_packages/<name>/package.json. Locked under ADR 0002 (2026-04-29). Additive over the pre-2026-04-29 schema; existing 5 packages stay valid without modification.

namespace.description: Builder-owned namespace prefix. Required. Slice A1 enforces against the static allowlist at docs/config/package-namespaces.json; ROADMAP §9.42 replaces that with builder_profile lookups.

name.description: Lowercase kebab-case identifier within the namespace. Qualified id is `<namespace>/<name>`.

kind.description: Install-behaviour discriminator. Existing packages omit this and default to feature. §9.52 — `entitlement` ships NO classes (no per-tenant code execution); the entire feature is centralised behind §9.50 capabilities + a billing block. Adding `entryClass` / `triggers` to an entitlement manifest is rejected at content-validation time.

system.description: §9.74 — when true, the package is auto-installed at tenant provisioning (`install_system_packages` step), hidden from tenant marketplace listing, and uninstall is restricted to super_admin (`Force uninstall` with reason). The bar is high — every system package is forced on every tenant forever. Existing packages omit this and stay 100% backward-compatible (defaults false).

category.description: Free-form (e.g. Communication, Reporting, AI, Insights, Localization, Branding, Vertical:Healthcare). Marketplace UI groups by this string.

entryClass.description: Optional. Class loaded by the runtime for this package's primary use case.

entities.description: Legacy flat entity list (still accepted). Prefer provides.entities + requires.entities.

extensible.description: Slice A2 — when true, the migrator adds a `customFields jsonb DEFAULT '{}'` column so tenants can ship sidecar extensions under tenants/<slug>/entities/extensions/<ns>__<name>.json.

inheritable.description: Slice A3 — when true, tenants may declare entities that inherit from this one via Joined Table Inheritance (child table whose primary key FKs the parent's, ON DELETE CASCADE).

sti.description: Slice B5 — opts the entity into Single-Table Inheritance. Tenants declare STI children that share this entity's table, distinguished by the discriminator column.

components.description: Component names contributed to the manifest scanner. Each must have index.tsx + meta.json under components/<Name>/.

tokens.description: Path to design tokens JSON. Required when kind == theme.

surfaces.description: Surface ID -> override descriptor map. Required when kind == theme.

config.description: Default config values. Tenants override via packages[].config in tenant config.json.

configSchema.description: Optional JSON Schema for the package's config field. Validator checks tenant config[].config against this at install time.

capabilities.description: §9.50 — runtime-API capability declarations. `required` must be granted at install time; `optional` are individually toggle-able. Each entry must be a known capability per the @xdeck/runtime-api catalogue (e.g. 'email:send', 'entity:read:Patient'). Reserved strings ('event:emit', 'event:listen', 'class:invoke:*') are rejected per §9.50.9.1. Content validation (catalogue + reserved) runs in PackageValidatorService.validate(); AJV here validates shape only.
